title: Rahmat
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Rahmat''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]]. It was the first escort of the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] group [[Furlo group|''Furlo'']] that was destroyed by Imperial forces under the command of the [[Courageous (Imperial-class)|''Courageous'']].

==Appearances==
